description: Money order of the Qodesh. Dated: 1477 Seleucid, which is 1165/66 CE. Issued by Shemuel b. Seʿadya, for 9.5 dirhams, from the collection of the compound of the Jerusalemites, to Abū Manṣūr b. Avraham al-Dimashqī. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 309 #71.) See also Goitein, Med Soc II, App. A, 136. NB: Goitein cites this document as T-S NS 320.32.
tags: waqf, Shemuel b. Saadya, qodesh, heqdesh, account
description_he: הוראת תשלום של ההקדש, 1477 לשטרות (1165/66). 9.5 דרהם מגביית מתחם הירושלמים לאבו מנצור בן אברהים אל-דמשקי.
